description: Fills a region between 3D shapes or points on a g3d graph with a colored, semi-transparent overlay. Requires minimum 3 points.
utility: Fill a region between 3D shapes with color

arguments.name: shapes
arguments.description: 3D shapes or points defining the fill region (minimum 3)

alternates.description: Fill region between three 3D points with default dodgerblue color

alternates.syntax: highlightfill3d(G, P1, P2, P3, P4, fc(red), fo(0.5))
alternates.description: Fill region with custom color and opacity

alternates.syntax: highlightfill3d(G, line1, line2, line3, fc(gold), fo(0.1))
alternates.description: Fill region defined by line3d segments (uses their endpoints)

examples.scenario: Fill triangular face between three 3D points
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = point3d(G, 1, 0, 0)
B = point3d(G, 0, 1, 0)
C = point3d(G, 0, 0, 1)
highlightfill3d(G, A, B, C)

examples.scenario: Fill quadrilateral face with red highlight
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
P1 = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
P2 = point3d(G, 2, 0, 0)
P3 = point3d(G, 2, 2, 0)
P4 = point3d(G, 0, 2, 0)
highlightfill3d(G, P1, P2, P3, P4, fc(red), fo(0.5))

examples.scenario: Fill triangle between three line3d segments (spherical coordinates)
examples.expression:
vecR = line3d(G, pOrigin, P, c(crimson), s(0.05))
vecProj = line3d(G, pOrigin, pProj, c(gray), s(0.03))
vecZ = line3d(G, P, pProj, c(gray), s(0.03))
highlightfill3d(G, vecProj, vecZ, vecR, fc(gold), fo(0.1))
